heading: Effectiveness of agreement
label: 283hh Effectiveness of agreement
text: Article VI, section 4(c), and article VII, sections 2 to 9, both inclusive, of the agreement shall have full force and effect in the United States, its territories and possessions, and the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico, upon acceptance of membership by the United States in the Corporation.
notes: CodificationSection is based on section 209 of title II of S. 2416, Ninety-eighth Congress, as introduced , and enacted into law by .Mar. 13, 1984Pub. L. 98–473
